message:
feat(oracle): Add DNA fingerprinting, evolution, and experiment modules

## Oracle Crate (vc_oracle)
- Added new modules for behavioral analysis:
  - dna: Agent DNA fingerprinting and similarity computation
  - evolution: Genetic algorithm framework with fitness metrics
  - experiment: A/B testing infrastructure with variant analysis
- Re-exported key types from new modules

## Collector Crate (vc_collect)
- ssh.rs: Improved SSH authentication handling (~50 lines)
  - Converted to async_trait for Handler implementation
  - Added RusshError variant for better error propagation
  - Fixed key authentication with mutable handle
  - Changed from agent auth to default key locations fallback
- collectors/mod.rs: Updated module structure
- lib.rs: Added new exports

## Store Crate (vc_store)
- migrations.rs: Added new migration registration
- schema.rs: Extended schema definitions

## TUI Crate (vc_tui)
- screens/mod.rs: Added new screen modules

## Other
- Cargo.lock: Updated dependencies
- Updated beads issue tracker

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
